tori-katsu.name: TORI KATSU SANDWICH
tori-katsu.description: A Japanese inspired sandwich made with crispy breaded chicken cutlet placed between soft bread or buns. The chicken is deep fried until golden and crunchy, then topped with shredded cabbage and a savory tonkatsu style sauce. The result is a satisfying combination of crunchy chicken, soft bread, and flavorful sauce.

plain-hotdog.name: HOTDOG SANDWICH PLAIN
plain-hotdog.description: A classic sandwich made with a juicy grilled or fried hotdog placed in a soft bun. The simplicity of the dish highlights the savory flavor of the sausage, making it a quick and familiar comfort food option that can be enjoyed anytime.

cheesy-nachos.name: CHEESY NACHOS
cheesy-nachos.description: Crunchy and satisfying starter made with a generous portion of crispy tortilla chips layered with rich, melted cheese. Each chip is coated with creamy cheese sauce that seeps into every corner, creating a perfect balance of crunch and gooey texture. The dish is ideal for sharing and delivers a comforting savory flavor with every bite. The saltiness of the chips combined with the creamy cheese makes it a simple but addictive snack that pairs well with cold drinks or heavier main meals.

nachos-overload.name: NACHOS OVERLOAD
nachos-overload.description: A more indulgent version of classic nachos, this dish comes piled high with crispy tortilla chips and a heavy layer of melted cheese, along with savory toppings that enhance both texture and flavor. The toppings typically include seasoned meat, beans, or additional cheese sauce, creating a hearty and satisfying appetizer. Each bite offers a mix of crunchy chips and flavorful toppings, making it perfect for sharing among friends or as a filling snack before the main course.

mojo-potato.name: MOJO POTATO
mojo-potato.description: Golden fried potato wedges seasoned with savory spices and herbs, giving them a flavorful crust and soft interior. These potatoes are fried until crispy on the outside while remaining fluffy and warm inside. Often served with a creamy dipping sauce, the dish offers a satisfying mix of crunch, saltiness, and comforting potato flavor. It is a popular snack that works well as either a light appetizer or a side dish.

tofu-squares.name: TOFU SQUARES
tofu-squares.description: Lightly battered tofu cubes fried to a crispy golden finish on the outside while remaining soft and tender inside. The tofu absorbs the seasoning and dipping sauce well, giving it a flavorful yet light taste. This dish is a great vegetarian friendly option that balances texture and flavor. Served warm, the tofu provides a mild, savory bite that pairs nicely with soy based or sweet chili sauces.

chicken-fingers.name: CHICKEN FINGERS
chicken-fingers.description: Tender strips of chicken breast coated in seasoned breadcrumbs and deep fried until crispy and golden brown. The outside offers a crunchy texture while the inside remains juicy and flavorful. These chicken strips are typically served with a dipping sauce such as honey mustard, barbecue, or garlic mayo, making them a comforting and familiar appetizer enjoyed by both kids and adults.

stuffed-bread-sticks.name: STUFFED BREAD STICKS
stuffed-bread-sticks.description: Soft bread sticks filled with flavorful ingredients and baked or toasted until the outside develops a light crispness. The filling may include cheese, savory meats, or seasoned vegetables that create a warm and satisfying snack. Each bite delivers a balance of fluffy bread and rich filling, making it a great quick bite for people looking for something light yet filling.

beef-shawarma.name: BEEF SHAWARMA
beef-shawarma.description: Thinly sliced, seasoned beef wrapped inside soft flatbread along with fresh vegetables and creamy garlic sauce. The beef is cooked with aromatic spices that give it a bold and savory flavor. Combined with crisp lettuce, tomatoes, and a drizzle of sauce, the wrap becomes a well balanced handheld meal that is both filling and flavorful.

chicken-shawarma.name: CHICKEN SHAWARMA
chicken-shawarma.description: Juicy slices of seasoned chicken wrapped in warm flatbread with crunchy vegetables and a smooth garlic based sauce. The chicken is marinated with Middle Eastern inspired spices that add depth and aroma. Each bite combines savory chicken, fresh vegetables, and creamy sauce, creating a flavorful wrap that is both satisfying and easy to enjoy on the go.

chicken-quesadilla.name: CHICKEN QUESADILLA
chicken-quesadilla.description: A toasted tortilla folded around seasoned chicken and melted cheese, grilled until the outside becomes crisp and golden. The inside remains warm and gooey as the cheese melts together with the chicken filling. Served sliced into wedges, the quesadilla offers a delicious combination of crunchy tortilla and savory filling, often accompanied by dipping sauces.

beef-quesadilla.name: BEEF QUESADILLA
beef-quesadilla.description: A hearty tortilla filled with seasoned beef and melted cheese, then grilled until the tortilla becomes crispy and slightly toasted. The beef adds a rich and savory flavor while the melted cheese binds the filling together. The dish provides a satisfying balance of textures and flavors, making it a filling snack or light meal.

hotdog-overload.name: HOTDOG SANDWICH OVERLOAD
hotdog-overload.description: An upgraded version of the classic hotdog sandwich topped with additional ingredients such as cheese, sauces, and possibly vegetables or extra meat toppings. The added ingredients create a richer flavor and a more filling meal.

hungarian-sausage.name: HUNGARIAN SAUSAGE SANDWICH
hungarian-sausage.description: A robust sandwich featuring a flavorful Hungarian style sausage served inside a soft bun. The sausage is typically seasoned with paprika and spices, giving it a smoky and savory taste. The rich sausage flavor pairs well with the soft bread, creating a hearty and satisfying handheld meal.

korean-corndog.name: KOREAN CORNDOG
korean-corndog.description: A popular Korean street snack featuring a hotdog coated in thick batter and deep fried until golden and crispy. Some versions include cheese inside or are coated with crunchy toppings like potato cubes. The result is a crispy outer layer with a warm savory center, often finished with sugar, ketchup, or mustard.

cheesy-baked-mac.name: CHEESY BAKED MACARONI
cheesy-baked-mac.description: A comforting pasta dish made with elbow macaroni mixed in a creamy cheese sauce and baked until the top develops a golden crust. The inside remains rich and creamy while the baked cheese adds extra flavor and texture. It is a warm and filling dish that combines pasta, cheese, and savory ingredients into a satisfying meal.

chicken-mac-n-cheese.name: CHICK N' MAC N CHEESE
chicken-mac-n-cheese.description: A rich and comforting pasta dish that combines tender macaroni with juicy pieces of seasoned chicken in a creamy cheese sauce. The macaroni is cooked until perfectly soft and then mixed with a smooth blend of melted cheeses that create a thick and velvety coating around every piece of pasta. The chicken adds a savory and slightly smoky flavor that balances the richness of the cheese, making the dish both hearty and satisfying.

chicken-alfredo.name: CHICKEN ALFREDO
chicken-alfredo.description: Fettuccine pasta tossed in a rich and creamy Alfredo sauce made with butter, cream, and cheese, then topped with tender slices of chicken. The sauce coats every strand of pasta, creating a smooth and indulgent texture. The chicken adds protein and depth, making the dish both rich and filling.

carbonara.name: CARBONARA
carbonara.description: A classic pasta dish featuring spaghetti tossed with a creamy sauce made from eggs, cheese, and savory bacon or pancetta. The heat from the pasta creates a smooth sauce that coats each strand while the bacon adds a salty and smoky flavor. The dish is simple but rich and satisfying.

tuna-pesto.name: TUNA PESTO
tuna-pesto.description: Pasta combined with fragrant basil pesto sauce and chunks of tuna. The pesto provides a fresh herbal flavor with hints of garlic and olive oil, while the tuna adds a savory seafood element. Together they create a light yet flavorful pasta dish.

aglio-e-olio.name: AGLIO E OLIO
aglio-e-olio.description: A simple Italian pasta made with spaghetti tossed in olive oil, garlic, and chili flakes. Despite its simplicity, the dish delivers a strong aroma and bold flavor from the garlic and olive oil combination. It is a lighter pasta option compared to cream based dishes.

classic-spaghetti.name: BIG BOYZ CLASSIC SPAGHETTI
classic-spaghetti.description: A classic spaghetti dish served with rich tomato based meat sauce. The pasta is coated with savory sauce made from ground meat, tomatoes, herbs, and spices, then topped with grated cheese. The dish offers a familiar and comforting flavor that appeals to a wide range of tastes.

chicken-wings-1.name: CHICKEN WINGS
chicken-wings-1.description: Crispy fried chicken wings coated in flavorful sauces. The wings are fried until crunchy on the outside while remaining juicy inside, then tossed in sauces that range from sweet and savory to spicy and tangy. Served with rice, the dish becomes a satisfying meal with bold flavor in every bite.
chicken-wings-1.mixedNote: Kindly input in the message before placing your order for mixed flavors.

chicken-wings-2.name: CHICKEN WINGS
chicken-wings-2.description: Crispy fried chicken wings coated in flavorful sauces. The wings are fried until crunchy on the outside while remaining juicy inside, then tossed in sauces that range from sweet and savory to spicy and tangy. Served with rice, the dish becomes a satisfying meal with bold flavor in every bite.
chicken-wings-2.mixedNote: Kindly input in the message before placing your order for mixed flavors.

bibimbap.name: KOREAN BIBIMBAP
bibimbap.description: A vibrant Korean rice bowl topped with a variety of ingredients including seasoned vegetables, marinated beef, and a fried egg. Everything is mixed together with spicy gochujang sauce, creating a balanced combination of textures and flavors. The dish offers a blend of savory, slightly spicy, and fresh tastes.

beef-yakiniku.name: BEEF YAKINIKU
beef-yakiniku.description: Thin slices of beef cooked in a sweet and savory soy based sauce, served over hot steamed rice. The beef is tender and flavorful, with caramelized edges that enhance the taste. The combination of rich beef and fluffy rice makes it a hearty and satisfying dish.

chicken-shawarma-rice.name: CHICKEN SHAWARMA RICE
chicken-shawarma-rice.description: Seasoned shawarma style chicken served on a bed of warm rice with vegetables and creamy garlic sauce. The chicken is marinated in aromatic spices that give it a bold flavor, while the rice balances the dish with its mild taste.

beef-shawarma-rice.name: BEEF SHAWARMA RICE
beef-shawarma-rice.description: Savory beef shawarma slices served with rice and fresh vegetables, topped with garlic sauce or tahini. The beef is rich and flavorful due to its marinade and grilling process, creating a filling rice meal with Middle Eastern inspired flavors.

pork-tonkatsu.name: PORK TONKATSU
pork-tonkatsu.description: A Japanese style breaded pork cutlet fried until crispy and served with rice. The pork remains juicy while the coating becomes golden and crunchy. It is typically paired with shredded cabbage and tonkatsu sauce for added flavor.

ebi-tempura.name: EBI TEMPURA
ebi-tempura.description: Lightly battered shrimp fried until crispy and served with rice and dipping sauce. The batter is airy and delicate, allowing the natural sweetness of the shrimp to stand out.

bacolod-inasal.name: BACOLOD CHICKEN INASAL
bacolod-inasal.description: Grilled chicken marinated in a mixture of vinegar, calamansi, garlic, and spices, giving it a smoky and tangy flavor. Served with rice, the dish is known for its aromatic taste and juicy texture.

chicken-pastil.name: CHICKEN PASTIL
chicken-pastil.description: A Mindanao inspired dish featuring shredded chicken cooked in garlic and spices, served over steamed rice. The chicken is savory and slightly oily, giving it a rich flavor that pairs perfectly with the rice.

pork-adobo.name: PORK ADOBO
pork-adobo.description: A classic Filipino dish made with pork braised in soy sauce, vinegar, garlic, and spices until tender and flavorful. Served with rice, the dish offers a savory and slightly tangy taste that is deeply comforting.

chicken-adobo.name: CHICKEN ADOBO
chicken-adobo.description: Tender chicken pieces simmered in a savory mixture of soy sauce, vinegar, garlic, and spices. The slow cooking process allows the meat to absorb the flavorful sauce, making it rich and aromatic when paired with rice.

pork-chop.name: PORK CHOP
pork-chop.description: A thick pork chop seasoned and fried or grilled until the outside becomes crisp while the inside remains juicy. Served with rice, it offers a hearty and satisfying meal.

liempo-bbq.name: LIEMPO BBQ
liempo-bbq.description: Slices of pork belly marinated in a sweet and savory barbecue sauce, then grilled until caramelized. The meat is juicy and slightly smoky, making it a flavorful dish when paired with rice.

rice.name: RICE
rice.description: Freshly cooked white rice prepared to be soft, fluffy, and lightly aromatic.
rice.calories: Estimated Calories: 200 to 250 kcal per cup

bangus.name: BANGUS
bangus.description: Filipino milkfish cooked either fried or grilled and served with rice. The fish has a mild, slightly sweet flavor and tender texture, often paired with vinegar dipping sauce for extra flavor.
